name: Project Braintrust (template)
title: Federated Research — Citation-Bound
incantation: COPPER FORGE FORGE RUNE COPPER BRONZE SILVER

abilities.name: Request
abilities.text: Open a research request Issue (label: braintrust-request). Defines topic, scope, deadline, quorum.

abilities.name: Contribute
abilities.text: Comment on the request Issue with rapp-braintrust-contribution/1.0. Every claim cited or labeled as opinion.

abilities.name: Synthesize
abilities.text: Aggregate contributions into reports/<request_id>.md (rapp-braintrust-report/1.0) via PR. Consensus = review.

meta.author: kody-w
meta._migrated_from_note: legacy v2 string, read-forever; the canonical rappid above is authoritative

avatar_svg:
